runtime_limits.description: Negotiated runtime capacities. per_plugin_concurrency must not exceed worker_count. Route capacities are derived exactly from negotiated limits: active hostcall routes = worker_count, canceled hostcall retention = worker_count + queue_capacity, and compile-flight artifact routes = worker_count.

per_plugin_concurrency.description: Maximum concurrent invocations for one plugin; must not exceed worker_count.

module_cache_entries.description: Maximum compiled modules retained by the runtime cache.

module_cache_source_bytes.description: Maximum source WASM bytes retained by the runtime cache (128 MiB).
